completed_work: Regenerated docs/self_model/SELF_MODEL.json with two supported warrants.
Updated self-model tests to accept both warrant records.
key_decisions: PLAN completion is certified by a new warrant edge rather than by mutating the PLAN record in this slice.
WARR-20260705-0002 certifies fulfillment only for the read-only L0 candidate diagnostics scope.
next_actions: Decide whether to update PLAN-20260705-0001 status to completed now that WARR-20260705-0002 certifies fulfillment.
risks: PLAN-20260705-0001 still has status proposed and therefore remains in open_plans until a separate PLAN-status completion slice is performed.
summary_text: WARR-20260705-0002 was added as a supported completion warrant for PLAN-20260705-0001. This warrant certifies that the read-only L0 candidate diagnostics plan has been fulfilled by implementation commit f0691d2, memory commit cd5a0d3, CAP-0002/VERIFY-20260705-0002 registration commit 647beec, and capability memory commit 74842bd. The warrant does not mutate PLAN-20260705-0001 status and does not claim automatic L0 retrieval, provider prompt changes, or context selection changes. SELF_MODEL.json now reports warrant_counts.supported = 2 and includes both WARR-20260705-0001 and WARR-20260705-0002. Post-commit audit after da7954e returned ok true and content current, so no index-refresh commit was needed.
